# tg_container_restart (Resource)

Restart a node or cluster container when trigger values change

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "tg_container_restart" "example" {
  node_id      = "35ee5516-c6d5-409b-b1ba-6aa2d0dd92fcf"
  container_id = "2f8e7f88-8fe7-4d6d-bf4b-53d131794664"

  triggers = {
    image_tag = "1.2.3"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container_id` (String) Container ID

### Optional

- `cluster_fqdn` (String) Cluster FQDN
- `node_id` (String) Node ID
- `triggers` (Map of String) Values that should trigger a container restart when they change

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
